description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on push to master branch and tags, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has two jobs: build and linter. The build job uses a matrix to run on Linux, macOS, and Windows with different compilers and shells, installing dependencies, checking out code, building SDL3, configuring, building, and testing. The linter job uses a matrix to run Cppcheck and Clang-Tidy on ubuntu-latest, installing dependencies, building SDL3, configuring, and running linters.
